top_signals.title: FTSE 100 Live: Stocks to dive, oil jumps as US-Iran strikes crush peace hopes
top_signals.summary: Good morning and welcome back to the City AM liveblog. The US and Iran are back to exchanging fire in a major blow to hopes of peace in the Middle East. Tehran struck an American airbase overnight in its retaliation for the US striking a military site that it said “posed a threat to US forces [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: China’s Crop Belt Faces Flood Risk as Heavy Rains Arrive Early
top_signals.summary: Heavy rains are arriving earlier and lasting longer across several parts of China this year, raising risks for agriculture and disaster management.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: BOK's New Governor Delivers Hawkish Hold | The Asia Trade 5/28/2026
top_signals.summary: "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade" brings you everything you need to know to get ahead as the trading day begins in Asia. Bloomberg TV is live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders on the biggest stories shaping global markets. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
